title: Ecommerce Success Formula | Launch Your Business in 9 Steps | Black Zero | Black Zero
description: Discover the proven 9-step ecommerce success formula by Black Zero. From niche hunting and sourcing to branding and marketing, we build your business end-to-end.
content_sample: BLACK ZERO The Time Proven Recipe For Effortless Ecommerce Success! This 9-step formula is the only thing you need to learn to build a successful eCommerce business from scratch. If you want to start your own ecommerce business, but... Have no idea about the most lucrative niche or product... Are confused about the BRAND NAME, LOGO DESIGN, PRODUCT PACKAGING, OR OVERALL BRANDING... Don't worry anymore now How we help you succeed in ecommerce without you needing to lift a finger? Working with our team allows you to save time and money by eliminating going through all the standard business procedures. We will take care of everything from the research and launch of your product, website, branding, IT and Marketing. 01 01 NICHE & PRODUCT HUNTING We are here to help you find the problem-solving, game-changing evergreen products that sell regardless of the time and location. Count on us for the product hunt or niche finding we will make you proud of your decision. 02 02 PRODUCT SOURCING After thorough market research we pick the best product suppliers. Then we evaluate them through sampling and ensure the product quality as well as quantity. Comparing competitive market rates we help you make profits by selling the quality product at a reasonable price. 03 03 BRANDING In the game of eCommerce, what you sell does not matter to thrive successfully. If you are able to make your ideal customers believe that yours is the only store they need, you win. And the best way to make that happen is eCommerce Branding. We will do your A to Z effective branding to make you stand out in a fiercely competitive ecommerce space. 04 04 TRADEMARK & BUSINESS REGISTRATION We know how hectic, complex and lengthy is the process of giving your business the legal shields. At the same, its very vital to protect your intellectual property rights. 05 05 CREATIVE DESIGNING With our talented, creative and skilled team of designers we engage, communicate and persuade the audience to sell your services and products in a way that they would love to pay for. We will boost your IT and Marketing with the help of creative visual communication. 06 06 WEBSITE DESIGN & DEVELOPMENT Utilizing the power of creative designing we build an eye-catching online presence of your business making it completely mobile and user friendly, SEO optimized and highly converting. We will help grow your business with a website design that customers love to visit and buy. 07 07 PERFORMANCE IT AND MARKETING The most vital par

title: Jeton Joins ACEMPI
description:
Jeton has joined ACEMPI, the Association of the Cyprus Electronic Money and Payment Institutions.
ACEMPI brings together regulated electronic money and payment institutions operating in Cyprus. Its role is practical. It creates a shared space for institutions to engage with regulators, exchange operational insight, and address issues that affect the sector day to day.Being part of the association means staying close to how the industry is thinking, where regulation is heading, and what challenges institutions are facing on the ground.
content_sample: Personal Jeton Card Fees Business Company About Newsroom Partnerships Media Assets Release Notes en L o g i n L o g i n S i g n u p S i g n u p Homepage Personal Jeton Card Fees B Business Company About Newsroom Partnerships Media Assets Release Notes Menu Menu L o g i n L o g i n S i g n u p S i g n u p B a c k t o N e w s r o o m B a c k t o N e w s r o o m News Jeton Joins ACEMPI Jan 13, 2026 • 2 min read Jeton has joined , the Association of the Cyprus Electronic Money and Payment Institutions. ACEMPI brings together regulated electronic money and payment institutions operating in Cyprus. Its role is practical. It creates a shared space for institutions to engage with regulators, exchange operational insight, and address issues that affect the sector day to day.Being part of the association means staying close to how the industry is thinking, where regulation is heading, and what challenges institutions are facing on the ground. As Cyprus continues to grow as a hub for electronic money and payment institutions, coordination across the sector becomes increasingly important. Individual firms can adapt on their own, but long-term stability depends on dialogue, shared standards, and clear communication with regulators. ACEMPI exists to support that process. It focuses on alignment, regulatory clarity, and responsible development of the payments ecosystem. Membership strengthens Jeton’s connection to the regulated payments community in Cyprus. It gives Jeton direct access to industry discussions that shape how electronic money institutions operate, comply, and evolve. This is not about visibility. It is about participation. Jeton sees value in contributing to industry-wide conversations, learning from peers, and helping move the sector forward in a coordinated way. Jeton plans to take an active role within ACEMPI and engage in discussions that support a stable, transparent, and well-functioning payments environment. Joining ACEMPI reflects Jeton’s long-term approach to growth. Build responsibly, stay close to regulation, and grow alongside the ecosystem rather than outside it. Disclaimer Jeton is a trading name of LA Orange Limited. LA Orange Limited is authorised by the Financial Conduct Authority under the Electronic Money Regulations 2011 for distributing or redeeming electronic money (e-money) and providing certain payment services on behalf of an e-money institution, with FCA registration number 902088. title: Jeton in FT1000 fastest-growing companies list
description: Jeton has been recognized by the Financial Times & Statista as one of Europe's 1,000 fastest-growing companies. It placed 75. on the FT1000 list.
content_sample: Personal Jeton Card Fees Business Company About Newsroom Partnerships Media Assets Release Notes en L o g i n L o g i n S i g n u p S i g n u p Homepage Personal Jeton Card Fees B Business Company About Newsroom Partnerships Media Assets Release Notes Menu Menu L o g i n L o g i n S i g n u p S i g n u p B a c k t o N e w s r o o m B a c k t o N e w s r o o m News Jeton has been recognized by the Financial Times as one of Europe's 1,000 fastest-growing companies Jul 25, 2024 • 3 min read Discover how Jeton has secured its place among Europe's fastest-growing companies, ranking in the prestigious Financial Times 1000 list. Learn about their remarkable growth journey, awards, and industry recognition. Global payment provider, LA Orange limited, trading as Jeton, found its place among the top . It placed 75. on the , showing some of Europe's rapidly expanding businesses, many of which are now global industry leaders. This recognition comes after years of diligent work and expansion for Jeton, which has grown significantly since its establishment in 2018. The company has since been providing a comprehensive range of services, offering a wider selection of products, and becoming a reputable partner to individuals and corporations. As a result of its global expansion, the company currently holds operational licences in the United Kingdom, Cyprus, and the Commonwealth of Dominica. These achievements have merited them prestigious awards such as . Additionally, Jeton has been officially certified by the International Standard for its top-tier security measurements. "Saaly Temirkanov, Executive Director of Jeton, expressed gratitude for the company's inclusion on this esteemed list, emphasising the team's commitment, hard work, and varied expertise. "We are excited about our recent achievement and the opportunities it presents for our future," he remarked. "This acknowledgment also underscores the unwavering support and confidence of our partners in our capacity to pioneer new ventures and deliver exceptional results on a daily basis." Temirkanov's sentiments echo Jeton's remarkable growth trajectory, evidenced by staggering revenue figures. Comparing revenue from 2019, which stood at £1,155,946, to 2022, where it soared to £25,132,227, reflects an extraordinary percentage increase, highlighting the company's resilience and strategic acumen in navigating dynamic market conditions." L e t ' s c o n n e c t L e t ' s c o n n e c t Scroll Mission Empowering financial freedom Our mission is to revolutionize the financial landscape by offering an intuitive and transparent financial platform. We believe that everyone should have full control over their assets, and that's why we've designed our services to be easy to use, fair, and transparent. We love to make things easier for everyone. Say goodbye to complex processes, hidden fees, and confusing jargon. We strive to make your payment experiences seamless and hassle-free, empowering you to pay and get paid with ease. We're dedicated to simplifying your financial life. Our innovative tools help you effortlessly track your money, giving you peace of mind and a clear understanding of your financial status. That's why we've designed Jeton, an all-in-one local payment App & WebApp that puts the world at your fingertips. title: Media Assets
content_sample: Personal Tarjeta Jeton Tasas Negocio Empresa Sobre Redacción Asociaciones Media Assets Release Notes es I n i c i a r s e s i ó n I n i c i a r s e s i ó n R e g i s t r a r s e R e g i s t r a r s e Página de inicio Personal Tarjeta Jeton Tasas N Negocio Empresa Sobre Redacción Asociaciones Media Assets Release Notes Menú Menú I n i c i a r s e s i ó n I n i c i a r s e s i ó n R e g i s t r a r s e R e g i s t r a r s e M e d i a a s s e t s These are official Jeton graphical resources that you can include on your webpage, in your mobile application, or in printed material. D o w n l o a d B r a n d K i t D o w n l o a d B r a n d K i t Identity D e s c a r g a r t o d o D e s c a r g a r t o d o Versions Jeton provides its trademarks in two distinct versions: the Wordmark, which embodies our brand identity and the Symbol, which encapsulates our core values. D e s c a r g a r D e s c a r g a r Used most often. Used often. Wordmark The Jeton wordmark is the official signature of the Jeton brand — Geometry, clean forms and soft edges give a timeless and contemporary feel to our identity. D e s c a r g a r D e s c a r g a r The wordmark’s safe zone is equivalent to the height of the ‘o’ on all sides. The wordmark can be placed in any of the 5 locations shown here. Please select the location that works best for your content – in the event where multiple options are possible, choose the most preferred option (i.e. corner 1 in the diagram over corner 3). We have a variety of minimum sizes for various formats. Please try to adhere to these values where possible. Digital 8px height Video Ratio 4:5: ⅔ wordmark width (end frame) Ratio 9:16: ⅔ wordmark width (end frame) Ratio 16:9: ⅓ wordmark width (end frame) Print A6: 25mm width A5: 35mm width A4: 35mm width A3: 55mm width A2: 80mm width A1: 120mm width Our partner lockup is a way of showcasing our great relationships with other brands For partnerships, we always start with our Jeton wordmark, before optically sizing “xHeight” our partner logos to achieve visual balance between both logos’ proportions. The lockup can be extended with multiple partner logos to the right, with Jeton logo always on the left. Symbol When taken in isolation, the three overlapped dots form our symbol. They act as a representation of the Jeton brand graphic system in its most reduced and simplified form. The symbol can be used as an endorsing mark or as a sign-off but should only be used in when the Jeton context is already evident. D e
